llm_analysis.assessment: The changes match the change request by rewriting all EN/ES site copy in CoFirstTimeBuyerGrants brand voice, removing competitor-specific text, and preserving the intent.

risks: lib/translations.ts:translations.hero.title - Potential misalignment with other components relying on this text
lib/translations.ts:translations.contact.subtitle - Changes in call-to-action might affect user engagement
lib/translations.ts:translations.testimonials.items - Changes in testimonials might affect perceived authenticity

llm_analysis.notes: The changes are primarily textual and do not involve input handling.
No APIs or contracts are affected as changes are limited to text content.

llm_analysis.recommendation: Consider adding tests to verify that translations are correctly applied and displayed across the application.
